prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.9 kg; Height 159.6 cm; BMI 26.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 8.5%), FPG (12 months ago 197mg/dL; 9 months ago 248mg/dL; 6 months ago 231mg/dL; 3 months ago 167mg/dL; current 206mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.8kg; 9 months ago 69.9kg; 6 months ago 69.9kg; 3 months ago 70.2kg; current 66.9kg), Height (12 months ago 159.6cm; 9 months ago 159.6cm; 6 months ago 159.6cm; 3 months ago 159.6cm; current 159.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 27.0kg/m²; current 26.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 50U/L; 9 months ago 55U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 49U/L; current 54U/L), AST (12 months ago 113U/L; 9 months ago 111U/L; 6 months ago 109U/L; 3 months ago 108U/L; current 107U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; current 26mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 762mg/g; 9 months ago 768mg/g; 6 months ago 595mg/g; 3 months ago 917mg/g; current 830mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 77mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 115mg/dL; 9 months ago 117mg/dL; 6 months ago 101mg/dL; 3 months ago 114mg/dL; current 108mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 9.4g/dL; current 9.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
